name: Clockwork Spring
descs:
[Effects apply only to #1, #2 Deployed Identities]

Skills that apply(including on self) [Vibration] Potency or Count gain Clash Power +1

When dealing damage to an enemy that has [Vibration] with Attack Skills(except E.G.O Skills) that inflict [Vibration] Potency or Count, deal +([Vibration] Potency on target + 5)% damage.

For Pride Skills: deal +(sum of [Vibration] Potency and Count on target +5)% damage
